name: Grovehome
descriptionSeed: Where the Rootkin meet the world — the only Quickwood settlement that keeps human hours, because trade requires it and the Rootkin find that funny. Grovehome is patient in a way that reads as either profound hospitality or maddening obstruction depending on how much of a hurry you are in. Deals here are made slowly and kept forever. The Rootkin have never once broken a bargain and they have also never once made one quickly.
encounterFlavor: Traders who have learned to wait; a Rootkin negotiator who will outlive your grandchildren and knows it; humans who came for a season and stayed a decade.
questSeeds: A trade agreement made ninety years ago is coming due and nobody alive on the human side knew about it
Somebody is cutting living wood in the Quickwood and the Rootkin have not yet decided what to do about it

substrateSource.reason: An ordinary Rootkin town, which is the point: ordinary Rootkin life runs on nothing the Precursors left.
